__inputs.name: DS_AE
__inputs.label: Cloudflare Analytics Engine
__inputs.description: Altinity ClickHouse datasource pointed at the Workers Analytics Engine SQL API

targets.query: SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS event, sum(_sample_interval) AS events FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t, event ORDER BY t
SELECT sum(_sample_interval) AS n FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'engine_panic'
SELECT sum(_sample_interval) AS n FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'js_error'
SELECT sum(_sample_interval) AS n FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'game_end'
SELECT sum(_sample_interval) AS n FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'stuck_decision'
SELECT sum(_sample_interval) AS n FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'chunk_reload'

SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob2 AS version, blob3 AS build, blob4 AS platform, blob6 AS message, blob7 AS detail, blob8 AS source FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 IN ('js_error','engine_panic') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT blob1 AS event, blob6 AS message, blob3 AS build, sum(_sample_interval) AS occurrences FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 IN ('js_error','engine_panic') GROUP BY event, message, build ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Game outcomes (mode x winner_kind, avg turns)

targets.query: SELECT blob7 AS game_mode, blob6 AS winner_kind, blob5 AS result, sum(_sample_interval) AS games, round(avg(double1), 1) AS avg_turns FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'game_end' GROUP BY game_mode, winner_kind, result ORDER BY games DESC

panels.title: Unimplemented-card demand (raw id lists from game_end)
panels.description: blob8 is a comma-joined oracle-id list per game. The AE SQL dialect has no arrayJoin, so per-card ranking needs client-side splitting (see scripts note in the setup guide) — this table surfaces the raw lists for eyeballing until volume justifies that.

targets.query: SELECT timestamp, blob7 AS game_mode, blob8 AS unimplemented_oracle_ids FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'game_end' AND blob8 != '' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Sessions per day
panels.description: session_start fires once per page load — an approximate session count (no install id, so distinct-user DAU is not derivable).

targets.query: SELECT $timeSeries AS t, sum(_sample_interval) AS sessions FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'session_start' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob5 AS game_mode, sum(_sample_interval) AS games FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'game_start' GROUP BY t, game_mode ORDER BY t

panels.title: Game completion (starts vs ends by mode)
panels.description: A mid-game reload re-emits game_start in the new client session; game_end re-emits too, so a resumed-and-finished game stays balanced. Only reload-then-abandon leaves starts > ends, which is itself signal.

targets.query: SELECT mode, sum(if(event = 'game_start', n, 0)) AS starts, sum(if(event = 'game_end', n, 0)) AS ends FROM (SELECT blob5 AS mode, blob1 AS event, sum(_sample_interval) AS n FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'game_start' GROUP BY mode, event UNION ALL SELECT blob7 AS mode, blob1 AS event, sum(_sample_interval) AS n FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'game_end' GROUP BY mode, event) GROUP BY mode ORDER BY starts DESC

panels.title: Top reported cards
panels.description: Player 'report this card' clicks grouped by oracle_id + name. avg_supported / avg_total triage misparse-vs-known-gap: a low ratio means the parser is missing clauses the card claims, a full ratio (supported = total) points at a runtime/engine bug on an already-parsed card.

targets.query: SELECT blob5 AS oracle_id, blob7 AS name, sum(_sample_interval) AS reports, round(avg(double2), 1) AS avg_supported, round(avg(double3), 1) AS avg_total FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'card_report' GROUP BY oracle_id, name ORDER BY reports DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Route usage
panels.description: route_view counts per coarse route (ids/params stripped). Shares the route vocabulary of js_error.route and session_start.route.

targets.query: SELECT blob5 AS route, sum(_sample_interval) AS views FROM phase_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 = 'route_view' GROUP BY route ORDER BY views DESC
